rationale: Educ. Code §25.0816 establishes a grant program for additional school day planning funded by appropriations and donations. It contains no provision tied to homestead exemption amounts or property tax revenue levels, so no direct conflict arises.
quote: the agency shall establish and administer a grant program to provide funding and technical assistance to school districts and open-enrollment charter schools to plan the school year and adjust operations as necessary to qualify for the incentive funding under Section 48.0051.
_note: No direct textual conflict. Indirect fiscal pressure on school districts from reduced property tax revenue is not a conflict with this statute's operative provisions.
